name: langguard-arbiter
description: LangGuard Arbiter — in-harness agent policy enforcement for OpenAI Codex. Screens, enforces, and evidences every MCP tool call against your LangGuard policies at the pre-action seam (PreToolUse). Deterministic ALLOW / DENY — ASK collapses to DENY (Codex has no interactive approval path from a hook); approval happens in LangGuard. No LLM in the enforcement loop.
